steps.title: Find the textual claim
steps.content: The text reports La Paz had higher park use ($67.5\%$) than Fortaleza ($35.7\%$), despite La Paz residents being less likely to live within a $10$-minute walk of a park. The text concludes: "greater proximity alone can't explain the difference in park use."

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice D matches the conclusion exactly: the difference in park use must be caused by something other than proximity. A makes a claim about researcher expectations (not in text), B about source dates (not in text), and C about survey accuracy (not in text).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
